quizzes.q: A new system is ready to go live. Which control is where a senior official formally accepts the risk?
quizzes.why: CA-6, Authorization, is where a senior official formally accepts the risk to operate.

quizzes.q: Where are known weaknesses tracked until they're fixed?
quizzes.why: Known weaknesses are tracked in a Plan of Action and Milestones — CA-5 — until they're fixed.
